issues.description: Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The card effect does not require a resting DON!! on your side; it allows you to rest opponent's DON!! cards. The condition should be 'Always' or removed entirely.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is imprecise. Should target opponent's DON!! cards specifically. Use 'ChooseOpponentDon' or similar DON-specific scope.
